datasets.greenAuthority: Green IAM and separately approved emergency access
datasets.rule: Revoke the token and retain only approved non-secret audit evidence.
Archive under the approved legal and security retention policy; do not claim the application log is complete.
Legacy organization documents never enter green. Archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green document ingestion starts empty.
Delete legacy cursors. Green ingestion begins without a checkpoint and creates new checkpoints only from green activity.
Retain required safety evidence, then delete at the approved retention trigger.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green audit and run evidence
datasets.rule: Archive required safety evidence; do not port the awareness event protocol.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green observability and run ledger
datasets.rule: Legacy participation rollups never enter green. Archive only under a fixed safety-retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green health starts empty.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green onboarding and current IAM
datasets.rule: Legacy memberships never authorize or enter green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green membership starts empty.
Legacy company documents never enter green. Approve an isolated archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Author green documents anew.
Legacy document versions never enter green. Approve an isolated archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green version history begins with the first green publication.

Legacy workspace documents never enter green. Approve an isolated archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green personas start from green defaults and post-launch user edits.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green persona and document approval ledger
datasets.rule: Legacy proposals and decisions never enter green. Approve an isolated archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. The green ledger starts empty.

Legacy grants never authorize green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded security evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Issue green grants anew against current IAM subjects and the approved scope model.

datasets.greenAuthority: Current IdP group authority plus fresh green authorization decisions
datasets.rule: Legacy groups and memberships never enter green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Define green groups anew from current authorities.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green MCP catalog populated by new registrations
datasets.rule: Delete legacy catalog rows. Green starts with no MCP servers and accepts only newly reviewed registrations against current endpoints or publishers.
Delete the install row, credential reference, connected-account identity, and legacy brokering state without interpreting them. The owner reconnects independently in green.
Legacy MCP access policies never authorize green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded security evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Author green policy anew.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green MCP authorization decisions and current IAM subjects
datasets.rule: Legacy explicit-user access rows never authorize green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded security evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Create green access decisions anew.
Legacy MCP grants never authorize green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded security evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Issue green grants anew.
Delete the row, secret reference, legacy credential identity, and brokering mode without interpreting them. The owner establishes distinct green custody independently.
Legacy metric samples never enter green. Archive only under a fixed operational retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green metrics start empty.
Delete legacy routing defaults without using their values. Green starts unset and fail-closed until current product and security owners define new policy.
Legacy evaluation cases never enter green. Archive only under a fixed retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop. Author green conformance fixtures anew.
Legacy routing measurements never enter green. Archive only under a fixed operational retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green measurements start empty.
Archive legacy governance history; create fresh green decisions from verified measurements.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green authorization and network-policy decisions
datasets.rule: Legacy database and CRD policies never enter green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded security evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Author green policy against current green targets.
Rotate and delete the legacy credential. The raw value and its identity never enter evidence, cutover artifacts, or green.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh secret-manager custody and green provider registration
datasets.rule: Delete legacy provider metadata without reading its secret reference or upstream registration identity. Create a distinct green credential and registration from the current owner account.
Delete legacy model rows. Green starts with no models; register models anew against fresh credentials and the current provider catalog.
Legacy dataset membership never authorizes or enters green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded security evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green membership starts empty.
Delete legacy source rows. Owners reconnect and register sources anew against current external endpoints; legacy identity and provenance are not inputs.
Legacy source items never enter green. Archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. New source registrations start with no items.

Delete without interpreting the row. It cannot narrow, authorize, seed, validate, or otherwise influence green scope; green authorization is created only from fresh green grants and current live authorities.
The deprecated legacy skill index never enters green. Archive only under a fixed retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green skills are published anew.

datasets.greenAuthority: Current non-legacy skill publishers plus fresh SkillRevision and ArtifactStore
datasets.rule: Legacy bundle rows and bytes never enter green. Archive only under a fixed retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop. Publish green bundles anew from current non-legacy sources.
Legacy entitlements never authorize green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded security evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Issue green entitlements anew.
Legacy promotion decisions never enter green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded governance evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. The green approval ledger starts empty.
Revoke and delete the legacy key and all legacy aliases or references. Any green key is newly issued after fresh green onboarding.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green cost and observability authority
datasets.rule: Legacy usage snapshots never enter green. Archive only under a fixed financial retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green usage starts empty.

datasets.greenAuthority: Current finance and product policy entered directly into green
datasets.rule: Delete the legacy value without reading it into green. Green remains unset and fail-closed until the current authority supplies a new currency and limit.

datasets.greenAuthority: Current finance and product policy entered directly into green
datasets.rule: Delete legacy account values without reading them into green. Green remains unset and fail-closed until the current authority creates a new subject-bound policy.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green onboarding and current IAM
datasets.rule: Legacy Tenant rows and identifiers never enter green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green UserTenants are onboarded anew.
Legacy schema history never enters green. Archive only as isolated provenance with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop.
Delete any surviving legacy billing table. Green billing starts empty and uses no legacy rows or identifiers.
Legacy pairing evidence never authorizes green. Archive only under a fixed retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop.
Delete any surviving legacy ClusterTenant table. Green fleet state starts empty and uses no legacy rows or identifiers.
Legacy domain evidence never enters green. Archive only under a fixed retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop.
Legacy evaluation rows never enter green. Archive only under a fixed retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop.
Legacy measurement rows never enter green. Archive only under a fixed retention requirement; otherwise reclassify to drop.
Archive named configuration evidence if required, then delete; never interpret it as green configuration.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh ArtifactStore populated only by new green writes
datasets.rule: Legacy bytes never enter green. Retain only in an isolated archive with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green ArtifactStore starts empty.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green backup and restore authority
datasets.rule: Delete all blue backups, snapshots, restore sets, keys, and recovery credentials. Retain only separately generated non-restorable deletion evidence; green backups are created and tested independently.
Delete legacy execution state after approved blue shutdown. Green resources are created anew and do not use legacy manifests, status, routes, identities, DNS, or certificates.
Force sign-in and discard browser caches, process sessions, pairing, and local conversation caches.
Delete legacy indexes, databases, and PVC state. Green Cognee starts empty and learns only from new green activity.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh Cognee populated only by new green events
datasets.rule: Legacy memory never enters green. Retain only in an isolated archive with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green memory starts empty.
Legacy source content never enters green. Archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green source connections start empty and fetch only post-onboarding content.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green fleet onboarding and current IAM
datasets.rule: Legacy fleet records, memberships, identifiers, and revisions never enter green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green fleet state starts empty.
The legacy ClusterTenant CRD spec never enters green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green fleet state starts empty.
Delete legacy ClusterTenant status. Green fleet state starts empty and does not read legacy status or identifiers.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green authorization and network-policy decisions
datasets.rule: The legacy AccessPolicy CRD spec never enters green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green policy starts empty.
Delete legacy AccessPolicy status. Green policy state starts empty and does not read legacy status or conditions.
The legacy Tenant CRD spec never enters green. Archive only as isolated, time-bounded evidence; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green UserTenants are onboarded anew.
Delete legacy Tenant status. Green UserTenant state starts empty and does not read legacy status, resources, or identifiers.
The legacy Cognee PVC is never mounted or read by green. Archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green Cognee starts empty.
The legacy skill PVC is never mounted or read by green. Archive only with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green skill storage starts empty.
Delete the legacy user-state PVC because it may contain credentials, keys, salts, or protocol state. Retain only separately generated non-restorable deletion evidence. Green state starts empty.
Archive only approved trace evidence and start the green analytical store fresh.
Archive only approved evidence; do not adopt the object store or expose it as ArtifactStore.
Archive approved evidence and create a fresh green database.
Delete the legacy cache. Green cache starts empty and contains only new green state.
Delete the legacy cache. Green LiteLLM cache starts empty and contains only new green state.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green LiteLLM instance and credentials
datasets.rule: Delete legacy teams, budgets, models, keys, databases, encrypted provider state, Redis, master key, and salt. Configure green anew without reading legacy values or identifiers.

Delete legacy managed-MCP volumes because they may contain credential or connection state. Retain only separately generated non-restorable deletion evidence; never inspect or mount the old volume from green.
Revoke and delete legacy custody state, database records, credential identities, key material, and references. Owners establish new green connections independently.

Delete the complete legacy database and every restorable copy because it contains drop-only credentials and secret references. Retain only separately generated non-restorable deletion evidence. Green databases start empty.

datasets.greenAuthority: Fresh green Thread, Message, Run, RunEvent, Approval, and Schedule stores
datasets.rule: Legacy runtime history never enters green. Retain only in an isolated archive with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green history starts empty.
Legacy registry bytes never enter green. Retain only in an isolated archive with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green skills are published anew.

datasets.greenAuthority: Green secret manager and upstream integrations
datasets.rule: Reconnect, rotate, or recreate credentials; raw values and legacy encryption material never enter evidence or green.

datasets.greenAuthority: Green audit, trace, and cost authorities
datasets.rule: Archive Langfuse and other required evidence under approved retention; start green stores fresh.
Delete the legacy bucket because it may contain credentials, keys, salts, or runtime protocol state. Retain only separately generated non-restorable deletion evidence. Green storage starts empty.

datasets.greenAuthority: New user-authored PersonaRevision and fresh ArtifactStore
datasets.rule: Legacy workspace and persona files never enter green. Retain only in an isolated archive with a fixed deletion date; otherwise reclassify to drop. Green personas start from defaults and new user edits.
